description: Rate Limiting — gateway enforces rate limits under burst traffic. Valid responses: 200 (request passed) or 429 (rate limit enforced). Never 500.

tasks.name: Gradual ramp to 20 VUs
tasks.notes: Primary burst test — ramp from 0 to 20 concurrent users over 3s, hold 10s.

tasks.name: Instant spike to 10 VUs
tasks.notes: Instant concurrency — tests rate limiter under sudden spike.

tasks.name: 429 response includes Retry-After
tasks.notes: RFC 6585 compliance — 429 responses should include Retry-After header.

tasks.name: Rate limit recovery
tasks.notes: After burst triggers 429, wait for window reset, verify single request succeeds.

tasks.name: Health endpoint under burst (fallback)
tasks.notes: For gateways without MCP — tests rate limiting on /health endpoint.
